CVE-2014-3004.title: The default configuration for the Xerces SAX Parser in Castor bef ...
CVE-2014-3004.summary: The default configuration for the Xerces SAX Parser in Castor before 1.3.3 allows context-dependent attackers to conduct XML External Entity (XXE) attacks via a crafted XML document.
